data.author: ewak
data.message:
memory safe subscription callback (#108)

Inherit from std::enable_shared_from_this
and wrap subscription callback in lambda
capturing a weak_ptr using weak_from_this()
to check that Bond object is still
in scope before processing the bondStatusCB
member function.

Co-authored-by: root <root@dev-lt-wakem.home>
Co-authored-by: Alejandro Hernandez Cordero <ahcorde@gmail.com>

data.author: gros-antoine
data.message:
bondpy migration to ROS2 (#89)

* move source code for ROS2 python pkg + translate code to ROS2

* add basic ros2 tests

* test for connection and disconnection

* use function to convert ros2 duration to seconds everywhere

* add 'data_files' argument for marker file

* adapt to current source code architecture

* add pytest

* reformat code to pass flake8 test

* add copyright

Co-authored-by: Chris Lalancette <clalancette@gmail.com>

data.author: Tobias-Fischer
data.message:
Fix osx and win32 builds (#83)

* Fix osx and win32 builds

* Explicitly mark symbol visibility and fix test_bond compilation on Windows

* Fix definition of BONDCPP_BUILDING_LIBRARY

* Switch to use target_compile_definitions to define NOMINMAX

* Cast msg fields to float.

This is to avoid a warning on Windows.  It is safe to do
since the heartbeat timeout or period aren't expected to
be outside the range a float can represent.

* Revamp copyString to use memcpy.

Also make it allocate less memory in general.

Signed-off-by: Chris Lalancette <clalancette@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Silvio <silvio@traversaro.it>
Co-authored-by: Michael Carroll <michael@openrobotics.org>

data.author: audrow
data.message: [ros2] Update maintainers - 2022-11-07 (#90)

data.author: SteveMacenski
data.message:
Lifecycle support 2 (#67)

Supersedes #64 to:

* Enable lifecycle nodes in ROS2
* Fix ROS2 porting issues
* Fix ROS2 WaitUntilXYZ() functions with spins on nodes already spinning (requirement for this to work)
* Tested to be actually working now & integrated into Nav2
* No reduced capability
* Removes a number of crashing problems introduced in porting

data.author: Karsten1987
data.message:
Ros2 devel (#54)

* bond-core porting to ros2

* added linter test cases.

* modified travis.yml file.

* Readme added in test_bond, Copyright information modified

* ros2_migration_readme.md is added, it contains overview, test procedure, changes related to migration.

* ros2_migration_readme.md is added and modified, it contains overview, build and test procedure, and changes related to migration.

* ros2_migration_readme.md is modified, it contains overview, build and test procedure, and changes related to migration.

* ros2_migration_readme.md is modified, ssh link added

* ros2_migration_readme.md file modified, errors removed

* travis.yml and ros2_migration_readme.md files modified

* CHANGELOG.rst file restored for each subpackage

* Added bondpy, bondpy is not migrated in ROS2 yet

* bondcpp/CMakeLists.txt modified, removed dependency on Boost as it is not used in code.

* test_bond_srv_gen removed, now Testbond.srv is genrated in test_bond

* package.xml file is modified for bond and test_bond, std_msgs and builtin_interfaces made to build and exec depends.

* Version in each subpackage is changed to 2.0.0.

* license information restored, enabled BSD, disabled Apache License 2.0

* statemap.py file added, modifications done for linter test.

* Renamed smclibcpp to smclib

* take over pr43

Signed-off-by: Karsten Knese <karsten@openrobotics.org>

* remove apache2 license

Signed-off-by: Karsten Knese <karsten@openrobotics.org>
